problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Combining Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
